chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 36 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 02-10-2023 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for applicants. Mr. M.M. Aqil Awan, Advocate for private respondents. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicants submits that purpose has been served, therefore, he does not press this Crl. Misc. Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
